ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video content */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Time the video was published */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the video belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total view count for the video */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total comment count for the video */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total like count for the video */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Total dislike count for the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, editor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video for which metrics are recorded */,
  "trending_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was trending */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the video received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the video */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video received */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_metrics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like record */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the video */,
  "like_time" TEXT /* Time the like was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the video */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video that was watched */,
  "watch_time" TEXT /* Time when the video was watched */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration of the video watched in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the watch record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the watch record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel that was subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subscription was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_videos" (
  "playlist_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record linking playlists and videos */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video included in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was added to the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_videos_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_videos_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video that the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video that the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_versions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)
